_doc: Bot registry TEMPLATE. Copy to ~/.lark-cli/daemon/bot-registry.json and fill in real values. (1) 'bots' = per-bot config used by daemon scripts + write-binding.ps1, keyed by a short name you pass as -Bot. (2) 'default' = AutoBot fallback for notify-once.ps1 when no binding file and no project matches. (3) 'projects' = AutoBot routing by CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR substring. Get chat_id from a p2p chat with the bot; 'profile' is a lark-cli --profile name (empty string = default lark-cli config).
